pkgmetadata.longdescription: j2cli - Jinja2 Command-Line Toolj2cli is a command-line tool for templating in shell-scripts,leveraging the [Jinja2](httpjinja.pocoo.orgdocs) library.Features Jinja2 templating INI, YAML, JSON data sources supported Allows the use of environment variables in templates Hello [Docker](httpwww.docker.com) )Inspired by [mattrobenoltjinja2-cli](httpsgithub.commattrobenoltjinja2-cli)
